_note: AU patient-record provider directory — a FIRST-PARTY named build (FLOW_PLAN H1 'AU provider metadata must be built'). This is structured metadata only: SMART App Launch endpoints + a REFERENCE (client_id_ref) to a secrets-manager key, NEVER a client secret, token, or credential (<security_and_secrets>). Every provider ships status 'input_gated' until an operator supplies conformance evidence + credentials; live connection is not opened by this file. Endpoints use the sanctioned example.invalid placeholder until real values are injected at deploy time.

providers.name: My Health Record (Australian Digital Health Agency)
providers.status_reason: Live MHR connection requires ADHA conformance registration, a registered OAuth2 client, and credentials via the secrets manager — none of which this repo holds. Metadata scaffold only.
providers.default_scope: launch/patient patient/Observation.read patient/Condition.read patient/MedicationRequest.read offline_access openid fhirUser
providers.conformance: AU Core 0.3.0 (structural validation via fhir-broker fhir_validate; ValueSet binding pending live NCTS)
providers.notes: My Health Record is the primary AU longitudinal source. Real endpoints + client registration are injected at deploy time; the id/scope/profile shape here is what the SMART App Launch flow will use.

providers.name: Public HAPI FHIR R4 sandbox (synthetic data)
providers.status_reason: Public, open, synthetic-data-only FHIR R4 server — the H1 smoke target. NEVER production (see fhir-broker/live-backend.js PUBLIC_SANDBOX_HOSTS refusal).
providers.conformance: Generic R4 (not AU Core profiled) — smoke/plumbing verification only, not clinical grounding
providers.notes: Open synthetic sandbox for proving the wso2 live-backend plumbing end to end without credentials. Data here is synthetic and unprofiled; it validates transport, not AU conformance.

providers.name: Bahmni (OpenMRS FHIR2 R4)
providers.status_reason: Track B (operator decision 2026-07-14). A live Bahmni connection requires a deployed Bahmni instance, a registered SMART-on-FHIR OAuth2 client, credentials via the secrets manager, and AU Core conformance evidence — none of which this repo holds. Metadata scaffold only; status flips to 'available' only when the operator supplies those.
providers.default_scope: launch/patient patient/Patient.read patient/Observation.read patient/Condition.read patient/MedicationRequest.read patient/AllergyIntolerance.read offline_access openid fhirUser
providers.conformance: Native FHIR R4 via the OpenMRS FHIR2 module. Base R4 out of the box — NOT AU Core profiled by default; AU Core conformance is a downstream localisation step (structural validation via fhir-broker fhir_validate against the vendored AU Core SDs; ValueSet binding pending live NCTS).
providers.notes: Bahmni = OpenMRS core (FHIR2 R4 module) + OpenELIS (lab) + dcm4chee (imaging) + Odoo (ERP). FHIR is served by the OpenMRS FHIR2 module (OpenMRS Public Licence, MPL-based); bundled components are NOT vendored — this is a network peer over FHIR R4, so no licence infects the runtime. OpenELIS may later serve as a live lab source for the investigation parser (separate track — out of scope here). Real endpoints + client registration are injected at deploy; the base-URL path shape (/openmrs/ws/fhir2/R4) is what the SMART App Launch flow will use. PHASE C ROLE (2026-07-24, ADR docs/structure-notes/fhir-backend-and-record-architecture-adr.md): Bahmni is registered as the venture's 'semi-siloed' OPERATIONAL / traditional all-in-one clinical EHR — partner-clinic ingest source (this entry), Rx-Remedy/clinic-operations, clinical-audit tracking, operational patient-record retrieval, order-management engine (OpenELIS/dcm4chee blood+imaging requests), and results-ingest repository. It is DELIBERATELY NOT the CDSS's live FHIR spine or system-of-record — that is Medplum (#medplum). Any Bahmni datum entering the (AU)CARE reasoning pipeline crosses THIS record-sources ingest (provenance-tagged, receipt-gated, no auto-promotion without clinician confirm), so the grounding discipline is unchanged by the fuller store behind it.
